hero.question: Will Pizza Hut be acquired before 2027?
hero.prob_take: Someone just got smart money on an acquisition thesis, jumping the line 8.5 points in 24 hours, probably on news that Pizza Hut's parent company (Yum Brands) is exploring strategic alternatives or a PE firm is sniffing around the balance sheet. At 41%, the market is pricing this as a coin flip, but PE shops have been sleeping on legacy QSR assets and Pizza Hut's real estate footprint is actually valuable to the right buyer, especially if you can cut costs and push digital ordering to 60%+ of revenue like Domino's already does.

daily_take.headline: Pizza Hut Acquisition Odds Jump 8.5pts, But 41% Still Looks Cheap
daily_take.deck: Pizza Hut futures spiked today on rumors of renewed PE interest and activist pressure on Yum Brands. The market repriced from 32.5% to 41%, but that's still discounting a franchise with $9B+ in system-wide sales and obvious consolidation appeal. Smart money is testing the bid here, especially with Yum's stock trading below intrinsic value and private equity hunting cheap assets.

sidebar.headline: CDU's 15pt crater suggests Scholz remains toxic despite economic headwinds, but 51.5% underweights a fragmented opposition.

sidebar.headline: Oilers collapsed 22pts overnight, giving sharp bettors a chance to fade the overreaction or back Avalanche at real value.
sidebar.label: Oilers vs. Avalanche: 38.5%

sidebar.headline: Fed cut odds exploded 28pts to 80.6%, but that's not a lock unless inflation rolls over harder than expected. Fade the certainty, hedge the base case.
sidebar.label: Fed Rate Cut by Sept 2026: 80.6%
